name_en: BOÎTE CHAPEAU SOUPLE New Soft Box
name_cn:
BOÎTE CHAPEAU SOUPLE New Soft Box
CDDE: M45578 [Exclusive Quality]
👜Size: 17*18*7cm
As a classic series, it has become a "must-have bag king style". The soft box is a versatile style with a classic retro look. The shoulder strap is flexibly adjustable, and the capacity is impressive. It is suitable for daily versatile looks and is an excellent choice for casual/office commuting. The round box's appearance is one you'll love the more you wear it, a versatile style you won't regret buying!
